title: onopyxus pyrenaeus
intro: Onopyxus pyrenaeus, also known as the Pyrenean onopyx, is a type of plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the Pyrenees mountains, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots. The medicinal properties of Onopyxus pyrenaeus include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to heal wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin irritations.
